name: Switch
description: On/off toggle control for binary settings. Provides accessible switch interaction with customizable sizes and optional label.

checked.description: Controlled checked state of the switch

onChange.description: Callback fired when checked state changes, receives new checked value

size.description: Size preset controlling track and thumb dimensions

label.description: Optional label text for the switch

labelPosition.description: Position of label relative to switch

id.description: ID for accessibility linking between label and switch
